headline: Jim Cramer on CSX: “I See a Great Long-Term Investment”
summary: CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) was among the stocks Jim Cramer shared his opinions on during Mad Money. A caller asked if Cramer sees it as a good long-term investment. He replied: No, I see a great long-term investment. Steve Angel’s running it. Remember how much money he made for us in Linde? It was incredible. Jeff […]

headline: Why Did CSX, PENG, UNH Stocks Ascend To 52-Week Highs Today?
summary: Earnings optimism, AI demand, and healthcare momentum drove gains.
